title: libpod/contrib/python/podman/podman/libs.Image.push disables TLS by default
body:
AFAICS https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/5f6ad82524ca7a3281c8464c84b4f9be4ff90aef/contrib/python/podman/podman/libs/images.py#L78-L81 disables TLS by default; that is a rather dangerous default.

Cc: @jwhonce

comments.body: Yes I think this should be set to True by default.
